{% for sec in site.sections | sort(attribute="path") %}{% if sec.name != "" and sec.language == page_language %}
{{ sec.title | e }}
  • {{ "sidebar.overview" | t }}
    • {% set ordered = sec.pages | rejectattr("is_index") | sort(attribute="weight") %} {% for p in ordered %} {% if p.extra.group and (loop.first or p.extra.group != ordered[loop.index0 - 1].extra.group) %}
  • {{ p.extra.group | e }}
    • {% endif %}
  • {{ p.title | e }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% endif %}{% endfor %}
